content:
## Profile Research Results for Joel Alfred Israel

Here are the comprehensive findings from researching all three profiles, plus additional discoveries:

---

### 1. 🤗 HuggingFace — https://huggingface.co/Joel01010

**Status: Profile exists but has NO publicly indexed content.**

- **Models:** None found
- **Datasets:** None found
- **Spaces:** None found
- **Activity:** No public activity detected

The username `Joel01010` is confirmed (it matches the GitHub handle and portfolio data), but the HuggingFace profile either has no public repos/models/datasets/spaces, or everything is private. Search engines have not indexed any content from this profile.

---

### 2. 🎓 Google Skills — https://www.skills.google/public_profiles/7dc6a9c6-f6ba-4302-84c4-5fa666a31087

**Status: Profile exists but content NOT publicly crawlable.**

- **Certifications:** Could not retrieve specific certifications
- **Badges:** Could not retrieve specific badges
- **Platform:** Confirmed to be a Google Cloud Skills Boost public profile (the URL format is valid)
- The profile may be set to private, or Google Skills Boost profiles are simply not indexed by search engines (which is common — these profiles are behind JavaScript-rendered pages that web crawlers can't access)

**Bottom line:** The URL is valid and it's a Google Cloud Skills Boost profile, but I cannot extract the specific badges/certifications through web search. This data would need to be manually provided or scraped from the live page.

---

### 3. 💼 LinkedIn — https://www.linkedin.com/in/joel-alfred-israel-a24204315

**Status: Profile exists but LinkedIn restricts public crawling.**

LinkedIn blocks detailed scraping/indexing for non-logged-in users. Here's what I could piece together from cross-referencing:

- **Name:** Joel Alfred Israel
- **Experience/Title:** CS Student at VIT Chennai
- **Education:** Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Chennai — Computer Science & Engineering (CSE Core), CGPA 8.09/10
- **Location:** Chennai, India
- **Skills (from portfolio):** C, C++, Python, Java, SQL, React, HTML, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, NVIDIA CUDA SDK, Azure Custom Vision, Ollama LLMs, Linux
- **Posts/Activity:** Could not retrieve specific LinkedIn posts

---

### 🔍 BONUS: Additional Discoveries from Cross-Research

#### GitHub Profile
- **URL:** https://github.com/Joel01010
- **Handle:** Joel01010
- Profile exists and is linked from portfolio

#### Research Publications (ResearchGate)
Joel Alfred Israel has co-authored academic research papers:

1. **"Exploring WebAssembly as a Runtime Platform for Safety-Critical Edge Systems"** (April 2026)
   - Conference: 2026 6th International Conference on Trends in Material Science and Inventive Materials (ICTMIM)
   - Co-authors: Nithin R., Aravinda Kannan KS, Kumaran K.

2. **"Furina: A Light-weight WebAssembly Runtime for ICS"**
   - Related work on lightweight WebAssembly runtimes for Industrial Control Systems
   - Same research group

#### Scribd Documents
- Uploaded documents related to **Data Science**, **Cloud Computing (AWS)**, **Operating Systems**, **Meta Quest 3 overview**, and a **Calligraphy Techniques and Styles Guide**

#### Portfolio Project Data (from `d:\portfolio-draft\data\portfolio.json`)
Full structured data already present in the project:

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Joel Alfred Israel |
| **Handle** | Joel01010 |
| **Title** | CS Student — VIT Chennai |
| **Tagline** | Builder of things. Breaker of things. |
| **Location** | Chennai, India |
| **Email** | joel010.alfred@gmail.com |
| **GitHub** | https://github.com/Joel01010/ |
| **LinkedIn** | https://linkedin.com/in/joel-alfred-israel-a24204315 |

**Projects (6):**
1. **UniUnion** (2025) — Flutter campus companion app [Flutter, Dart, Firebase]
2. **Club Events Website** (2025) — Node.js campus events site [Node.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML]
3. **AI Internship Recommender** (2025) — Ollama-powered recommendations [Python, Ollama, LLM]
4. **Hamming Code Simulator** (2024) — Error-correction learning tool [TypeScript, HTML, CSS]
5. **Murder-Mansion** (2024) — Text adventure game [Python]
6. **Digital Well-being App** (2024) — Virtual pet screen-time app [Figma, UI/UX]

**Skills:**
- Languages: C, C++, Python, Java, SQL
- Frontend: React, HTML, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python
- AI/ML & Tools: NVIDIA CUDA SDK, Azure Custom Vision, Ollama LLMs, Linux

---

### ⚠️ Limitations
The three target profiles (HuggingFace, Google Skills, LinkedIn) are all behind walls that web search cannot penetrate deeply:
- **HuggingFace:** Empty or private profile
- **Google Skills Boost:** JavaScript-rendered, not indexed by search engines
- **LinkedIn:** Requires authentication for detailed profile data

To get exact badge counts, certification names, and LinkedIn activity, the user would need to provide this information manually or use a screenshot/export from each platform.
